name: Deploy game to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]  # Of 'master' als dat je hoofdbranch is

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: github-pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Windows, X64]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: brickbreaker (optioneel aanpassen)
        run: |
          echo "⚙️ Hier zou je Unity WebGL build draaien"
          mkdir -p build
          echo "<html><body><h1>Hello from self-hosted runner 🎮</h1></body></html>" > build/index.html

      - name: Upload Pages artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v2
        with:
          path: ./build

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Windows, X64]
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}

    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v2
